title: Level 977

had already rescued over 5.4 thousand wanderers. The group was widely known across the backrooms, and it was often used to travel from levels like Level 977 to safer ones.
Due to the events of The Flicker, the group was mostly forgotten. However, M.E.G. launched an investigation into anything left of the group. Only remains of the group were found on Level 977.
those are hallucinations, as the level was confirmed to catch hallucinations on camera after a dedicated member of M.E.G. escaped from Level 977 after a failed expedition, and after realizing he was on a different level, he started taking
[[File:Whathappened.jpg|center|frameless|613x613px|link=]]
What happened to Level 977? As much as I heard, this level was confirmed. And yet it vanished, without the reason being affirmed. How did it happen? Where did it go? With no one to delete it, who let it like so?

----- Hey, Do you have anything saved related to Level 977? I just realized it's gone from The Database. I don't know what happened, but I opened a forum on Backchat , if you wanna check that out. I'm waiting for your response.
- Mike

Though I never read about it, Level 977 sparked my interest. Entering my thoughts, I wondered three things: Where is Level 977? What happened to Level 977?
''What is Level 977?''
''What is Level 977?''

Type here...
'''''> Send'''''
{{URL|security=backnet0|link=thearchives.org/contact}} [[File:Meg.png|443x443px|frameless|center|link=]] '''CONTACT MEG'''
Hello, My friend and I recently noticed that Level 977 has been taken off the database. I actually thought that wasn't possible, and I have no clue how that happened, but do you possibly have an archive of the page?
'''''> Send'''''
And yet to no avail, I couldn't find an answer. It was almost as if all this was done by a prankster. But a premise fell right beside me. And I promised that by the end of my life, the level I shall see.
[[File:UgotMailorsmthidk.png|center|frameless|293x293px|link=]]
{{URL|link=███████████████|security=backnet██}} '''From:''' ''M.E.G.(MajorExplorerGroup@████████.com)''
'''To:''' ''{{USERNAME}}({{USERNAME}}@████████.com)''
'''Subject:''' ''Level 977 Archive''
-----
Dear {{USERNAME}}, Sadly, it seems we have not saved anything regarding Level 977. However, we are planning on sending a team to re-research the level. This will be hard, since no one seems to know the entrance, but you can count on us. In the meantime, try to find something about it on the internet or simply focus on something else. This might take a long time.
You won't find it, {{USERNAME}}. You're not meant to. This wasn't by accident; everything was planned. Not by "M.E.G.", your friend "Mike", or any other man. The level shall disappear and never come back. But for some reason, it can't do it normally like that. It still has a physical form, which is very true. But its page is gone, and everyone's memories of it too. All entrances are closed off; don't even try. ''Level 977 is gone forever; it's time to say goodbye.''
Sincerely,
- Major Explorer Group
Everyone failed, very few cared, For the existence of Level 977. As I read the mail, a flash crossed my mind, And I asked a question, which I had to find. ... How did they know my mail address?
Per usual, they respond via the same page, send a notification, but never mail. I haven't told them once about those things, ... ''Maybe I should check back? ''
[[File:Backrooms_Today_(Remake).png|center|frameless|304x304px|link=]] '''𝔅𝔞𝔠𝔨𝔯𝔬𝔬𝔪𝔰 𝔗𝔬𝔡𝔞𝔶'''
== M.E.G. SENDS A RESEARCH TEAM TO FIND THE LOST LEVEL 977 == [[File:Meg.png|right|frameless|304x304px|link=]] Just recently, M.E.G. has made an official statement that they will begin searching for "Level 977" after the page behind it on The Database has been lost. It seems no one remembers the entrance to the level, so officials say this will be a very difficult task. It is predicted that the whole investigation will take 1 year, before it's cancelled, if they don't find anything. It is highly encouraged for other groups or people to also try to find the level and make sure to be safe while doing so. No one wants another lawsuit. == LOST OUTPOST FOUND == [[File:GrayscaleHome.png|right|frameless|304x304px|link=]] Just 3 years ago, a small group released a statement saying their outpost was presumably lost, having shifted onto another level. After years of search and a prize of vast resources, after asking when the outpost originally was, it was found at the same level, the same day. Although many are pretty irritated that the group wasted their time, the people who found it still received the prize. From now on, it is recommended to tell where a thing was before it got lost the next time you think that thing went to another level and left you behind.
... It's all useless. As much as I wanted to, there's not much to do about this. Whatever talked to me doesn't want me to say a word. It will delete anything I say; no one will see. The only thing I can is wait for something to happen. ...
And something eventually will.
{{URL|link=███████████████|security=backnet-██}} '''From:''' ''Mike(MikerDiker69@████████.com)''

----- {{USERNAME}}. I GOT GOOD NEWS. I MET SOMEONE WHO'S STILL STUCK ON THE LEVEL. I CAN'T POST THIS ON BACKCHAT FOR SOME REASON, CUZ IT GIVES ME AN ERROR, BUT I TALKED WITH THE PERSON ANYWAY, AND WE CAN MEET IN A CHAT ROOM. HERE'S THE LINK: backnet1://██████████.xyz
- Mike
{{URL|link=██████████.xyz|security=backnet1}}
𝔓𝔯𝔦𝔳𝔞𝔱𝔢 ℭ𝔥𝔞𝔱 ℜ𝔬𝔬𝔪𝔰
Hey, ok listen, Mike, this website is pretty poor quality, so we gotta put those name thingys before talking so we know who is who.
Miker: Like this?
Zenit: Yep! Alright, so like, I remember you wanted proof, right?
Miker: Yeah lol, can't really trust anything without it lol, you got a camera right?
Zenit: Mhm! Hold up, let me take a picture, I'll brb
Miker: ok
Zenit:
[[File:Level977possibly.png|left|frameless|373x373px|link=]]
Zenit: There are a lot of computers, as you can see, I had to go out in the middle to take this picture lol.
Miker: Seems legit, checked around, no previous levels with this image. Mainly, do you remember how you got here?
Zenit: Nope. Idk why, it just seems no matter how hard I try, that memory is like removed or something.
Miker: Oh. Did you like see any entities here?
Zenit: I did, but it's pretty weird. You see, there was a bunch of entities around. Not really "monster" like entities. I can't really explain them, but they just felt like they were the missing puzzle to this level. Ever since I got on BackChat and saw the levels gone from the database, none of those entities ever appeared again.
Miker: Oh, that's like really interesting. Do you think the level being deleted has to do anything with that?
Zenit: I don't have a clue. Might be, but that's like really absurd.
Miker: Alright. Hold on, let me invite my friend.
Zenit: Oh ok, I'll wait. Weren't you also gonna post on Backchat?
Miker: I tried earlier, and it didn't work. Anyway, I sent an email. Hopefully, they respond in time.
Send a message...
{{USERNAME}}: Hello? I looked through your chats. Zenit, can I tell you something?
Zenit: Sure!
{{USERNAME}}: Ok listen. All the entrances have ████████████████. There is ███████. Alright? I'm guessing there are ██ exits ██████. Listen, Zenit, I ████ you have ████, cuz you're █████ here ███████.
Zenit: Yo, you good? There are these censor bars or something lol. Are you telling me slurs or something because those things are redacted lol
{{USERNAME}}: No, no, ok, ok. Listen, Zenit, do you have food?
Zenit: No, not really, I wasn't planning on staying here for long.
{{USERNAME}}: Alright. Is there any food on this level?
Zenit: No, I don't think so.
{{USERNAME}}: Damn. Alright atleast you can answer some questions right? Were the entities dangerous?
Zenit: Yeah, one jumped at me. They seem pretty blind; if you don't come near them, they don't see you. They're don't hear via sound though; they just have a low field of view, I guess.
{{USERNAME}}: Alright, well, are there any other rooms compared to the image you sent?
Zenit: I don't think so. You know, let me check behind the door. The last time I did it was just the same room.
{{USERNAME}}: Alright!
Zenit: Oh, what the hell? There's just straight up nothing there now lol. A void.
{{USERNAME}}: Well, ok. Let me note all this.
{{USERNAME}}: Ok, listen, I feel like there's enough info to make it a good placeholder for the site on the database. I'm pretty good at writing in formal, so I feel like everything should be fine.
Zenit: Alright! I'll be waiting!
Send a message...
How I wish I were telling the truth. Deep inside, I knew the chances were slim. But I was willing to try. Again, and again. I could copy paste the page if it ever got deleted. I'll have it all saved.
Everything seems foolproof. So now, I just have to try.
